positive: A complex, symmetrical botanical-geometric mandalic design featuring stylized celestial flora and interlocking sacred geometry patterns. The main motifs include glowing sapphire blue monstera leaves, highly detailed golden filigree stardust, and stylized bioluminescent fungi. The composition should be centered and highly decorative, presented in a vintage scientific illustration style mixed with modern vector art. Utilize deep navy blue, emerald green, and luminous gold as the primary color palette. The artwork must have clean, crisp lines and strong silhouettes, designed to look impeccable when printed on apparel fabric. Full composition, zero gradients, highly detailed line work, isolated on a clean background.
